name: proc_creation_win_susp_non_exe_image
raw_query: any where (not (process.executable like~ ("*.bin", "*.cgi", "*.com", "*.exe", "*.scr", "*.tmp"))) and (not ((process.executable like~ ("System", "Registry", "MemCompression", "vmmem")) or process.executable:"*:\\Windows\\Installer\\MSI*" or process.executable:"*:\\Windows\\System32\\DriverStore\\FileRepository\\*" or (process.executable:"*:\\Config.Msi\\*" and (process.executable like~ ("*.rbf", "*.rbs"))) or (process.parent.executable:"*:\\Windows\\Temp\\*" or process.executable:"*:\\Windows\\Temp\\*") or process.executable:"*:\\$Extend\\$Deleted\\*" or (process.executable like~ ("-", "")) or (?process.executable == null))) and (not (process.parent.executable:"*:\\ProgramData\\Avira\\*" or (process.executable:"*NVIDIA\\NvBackend\\*" and process.executable:"*.dat") or ((process.executable like~ ("*:\\Program Files (x86)\\WINPAKPRO\\*", "*:\\Program Files\\WINPAKPRO\\*")) and process.executable:"*.ngn") or (process.executable like~ ("*:\\Program Files (x86)\\MyQ\\Server\\pcltool.dll", "*:\\Program Files\\MyQ\\Server\\pcltool.dll")) or (process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Packages\\*" and process.executable:"*\\LocalState\\rootfs\\*") or process.executable:"*\\LZMA_EXE" or process.executable:"*:\\Program Files\\Mozilla Firefox\\*" or (process.parent.executable:"C:\\Windows\\System32\\services.exe" and process.executable:"*com.docker.service")))
